text: What are the AI model API costs including per-call pricing and token costs?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate from expected request volume, average token usage, and provider pricing.

text: What is the cost per API call/request for each model being considered?
aiAgentGuidance: Look up current pricing for shortlisted models and tiers.

text: What are the input vs. output token cost differentials?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate from model pricing and expected input/output token ratios.

text: What batch vs. real-time pricing differences exist?
aiAgentGuidance: Compare batch and real-time pricing for applicable providers.

text: What are the costs for fine-tuning models?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate fine-tuning costs from data volume, model size, and provider pricing.

text: What reserved capacity or committed use discounts are available?
aiAgentGuidance: Research volume discounts and commitment options for each provider.

text: How will API cost spikes from unexpected usage be controlled?
aiAgentGuidance: Design cost control mechanisms (rate limits, budgets, alerts).

text: What is the cost projection for 1x, 5x, and 10x current usage?
aiAgentGuidance: Model cost scaling at different usage multipliers.

text: What are the embedding model costs for RAG implementation?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate embedding costs from document volume and refresh frequency.

text: What prompt caching or response caching savings are achievable?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate cache hit rates and associated cost savings.

text: What multi-model routing cost optimization is possible (cheaper models for simpler queries)?
aiAgentGuidance: Design model routing strategy with cost-quality trade-offs.

text: What are the costs for content safety and moderation APIs?
aiAgentGuidance: Price out moderation API costs based on expected call volume.

text: What are the total compute, GPU, and database hosting infrastructure costs?
aiAgentGuidance: Size and price compute resources from deployment architecture.

text: What GPU/TPU rental or purchase costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Price GPU options (cloud instances, reserved, spot) for inference workloads.

text: What vector database hosting costs are expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Price vector DB options based on index size and query volume.

text: What data storage costs are projected (S3, databases, caches)?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate storage costs from data volume and access patterns.

text: What networking and data transfer costs are expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate egress and inter-service data transfer costs.

text: What monitoring and observability platform costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Price monitoring tools (LangSmith, Datadog, etc.) for expected data volume.

text: What CDN and edge computing costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate CDN costs from geographic distribution and request patterns.

text: What are the costs for development and staging environments?
aiAgentGuidance: Size non-production environments and calculate costs.

text: What disaster recovery infrastructure costs are required?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate DR infrastructure costs from RPO/RTO requirements.

text: What auto-scaling cost implications exist for peak loads?
aiAgentGuidance: Model peak load costs based on traffic patterns and scaling policies.

text: What is the total monthly infrastructure run cost?
aiAgentGuidance: Sum all infrastructure cost components for monthly total.

text: What is the total team cost including developer-months for AI development?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate team cost from required roles, rates, and timeline.

text: How many developer-months are needed for initial implementation?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate effort from scope, complexity, and team size.

text: What external contractor or consulting costs are expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify specialized skills needing external support and estimate costs.

text: What AI/ML tool licensing costs are needed (development, testing, deployment)?
aiAgentGuidance: Inventory required tools and look up licensing costs.

text: What training and upskilling costs are needed for the team?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify training needs and estimate certification/course costs.

text: What data labeling and annotation costs are expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate labeling costs from data volume and complexity.

text: What testing and quality assurance costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate testing effort and costs from scope and quality requirements.

text: What UX/UI design costs are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate design effort from interface complexity and iterations.

text: What project management overhead is expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate PM cost as percentage of total development effort.

text: What is the total estimated build cost?
aiAgentGuidance: Sum all development cost components.

text: What ongoing maintenance team costs are expected (SRE, DevOps, ML Engineering)?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate maintenance FTE needs from system complexity and SLA requirements.

text: What model retraining and update costs are projected?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate retraining frequency and associated compute costs.

text: What data pipeline operational costs are expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate pipeline compute and orchestration costs.

text: What customer support costs are attributed to AI features?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate support ticket volume and cost per ticket.

text: What security and compliance operational costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate security monitoring and compliance activity costs.

text: What vendor management and procurement costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate vendor management overhead.

text: What incident response and on-call costs are expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate on-call costs from expected incident frequency and severity.

text: What documentation and knowledge management costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate effort for maintaining technical documentation.

text: What is the total monthly operational run cost?
aiAgentGuidance: Sum all operational cost components for monthly total.

text: What AI platform licensing costs apply (Azure AI, AWS Bedrock, GCP Vertex)?
aiAgentGuidance: Look up platform pricing for expected usage levels.

text: What third-party API subscription costs are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Inventory required third-party APIs and pricing tiers.

text: What MLOps platform licensing costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Price MLOps platforms based on team size and usage.

text: What data platform licensing costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate data platform costs from data volume and feature needs.

text: What security and compliance tool licensing costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Price security tools based on scope and features needed.

text: What development tool licensing costs apply (IDE, CI/CD, testing)?
aiAgentGuidance: Inventory development tools and per-seat pricing.

text: What total annual licensing and subscription cost is expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Sum all licensing costs for annual total.

text: What cost optimization strategies and efficiency improvement plans are in place?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose optimization strategies (caching, batching, model routing, prompt compression).

text: What reserved instance or savings plan opportunities exist?
aiAgentGuidance: Analyze usage patterns for reserved pricing opportunities.

text: How will spot/preemptible instances be used to reduce costs?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify workloads suitable for spot instances and estimate savings.

text: What auto-scaling policies will optimize cost efficiency?
aiAgentGuidance: Design scaling policies that balance cost and performance.

text: How will unused or idle resources be identified and eliminated?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up resource utilization monitoring and cleanup automation.

text: What token optimization strategies will reduce API costs?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose prompt compression and output limiting strategies.

text: How will cost per transaction/query be tracked and optimized?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up cost-per-unit tracking and optimization targets.

text: What model distillation or smaller model substitution opportunities exist?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify tasks where smaller, cheaper models can maintain quality.

text: What estimated cost savings are achievable through optimization?
aiAgentGuidance: Quantify potential savings from each optimization strategy.

text: What is the Year 1 budget and 3-year total cost of ownership (TCO) projection?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate total Y1 budget from all cost categories.

text: What is the projected Year 2 and Year 3 run cost?
aiAgentGuidance: Project costs with growth assumptions and optimization targets.

text: What is the 3-year total cost of ownership (TCO)?
aiAgentGuidance: Sum build cost + 3 years of run costs with inflation factors.

text: What budget approval process is required?
aiAgentGuidance: Map budget approval to organization's financial governance.

text: What contingency budget percentage should be applied?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend contingency based on project complexity and risk level.

text: What is the monthly burn rate during development phase?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate monthly development spend rate.

text: What is the monthly run cost after production deployment?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate steady-state monthly operational cost.

text: How will budget variance be tracked and reported?
aiAgentGuidance: Design budget tracking dashboard and variance reporting.

text: What cost allocation model will be used (per-department, per-use-case)?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose cost allocation model based on organizational structure.

text: What chargeback or showback mechanisms will be implemented?
aiAgentGuidance: Design chargeback system for cross-departmental cost visibility.

text: What is the projected annual return and payback period for this AI investment?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate annual return from cost savings, revenue, and efficiency gains.

text: What is the payback period for this investment?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate payback from cumulative costs vs. cumulative benefits.

text: What is the net present value (NPV) of this investment over 3 years?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate NPV with appropriate discount rate.

text: What internal rate of return (IRR) is expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate IRR from projected cash flows.

text: How will value delivery be measured against cost?
aiAgentGuidance: Design value tracking dashboard with cost-per-outcome metrics.

text: What leading indicators will predict ROI achievement?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify leading metrics that correlate with value delivery.

text: What baseline measurements exist for ROI comparison?
aiAgentGuidance: Document current-state metrics for before/after comparison.

text: How will intangible benefits (knowledge, capability, speed) be valued?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human judgment on intangible benefit valuation.

text: What vendor selection criteria apply to AI service providers?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate vendor evaluation scorecard from requirements.

text: What procurement process is required for AI tools and services?
aiAgentGuidance: Map to organization's procurement workflow and timelines.

text: What contract negotiation leverage exists (volume, multi-year, bundling)?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify negotiation levers based on usage volume and commitment.

text: What payment terms and structures optimize cash flow?
aiAgentGuidance: Compare payment options (annual, monthly, usage-based) for cash flow impact.

text: What vendor consolidation opportunities reduce costs?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify consolidation opportunities across AI vendor portfolio.

text: What vendor lock-in risks exist and how are they mitigated financially?
aiAgentGuidance: Quantify switching costs and recommend lock-in mitigation.

text: What multi-cloud or multi-vendor strategy diversifies financial risk?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose multi-vendor strategy balancing cost and risk.

text: What FinOps practices, cost controls, and governance processes are established?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend FinOps framework for AI cost management.

text: What cost alerting thresholds will be set?
aiAgentGuidance: Set budget alert thresholds at 50%, 75%, 90%, 100% of budget.

text: What approval workflow governs spending above thresholds?
aiAgentGuidance: Design spending approval workflow aligned with financial authority levels.

text: How will cloud cost anomalies be detected?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up anomaly detection for cloud spending spikes.

text: What cost reporting cadence and audience applies?
aiAgentGuidance: Define reporting schedule and audience by cost impact level.

text: What tagging and labeling strategy enables cost attribution?
aiAgentGuidance: Design resource tagging taxonomy for cost tracking.

text: How will cost optimization recommendations be generated and tracked?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up optimization recommendation pipeline with tracking.

text: What financial controls prevent runaway AI costs?
aiAgentGuidance: Design hard limits and circuit breakers for AI spending.

text: How will costs scale with 2x, 5x, 10x user growth?
aiAgentGuidance: Model cost at different growth scenarios.

text: What economies of scale are expected at higher volumes?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify volume discount thresholds and efficiency gains.

text: What is the marginal cost per additional user or transaction?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate marginal cost from variable cost components.

text: At what scale does self-hosting become more cost-effective than APIs?
aiAgentGuidance: Model crossover point between API and self-hosted costs.

text: What usage growth rate is assumed in financial projections?
aiAgentGuidance: Project growth rate from business goals and market analysis.

text: How will seasonal or cyclical demand patterns affect costs?
aiAgentGuidance: Analyze demand patterns and model cost variability.

text: What cost-per-outcome metric tracks efficiency at scale?
aiAgentGuidance: Define cost-per-outcome metrics for different scaling scenarios.

text: What financial risks including cost overruns and budget variance scenarios are identified?
aiAgentGuidance: Model financial impact of key risk scenarios.

text: What is the financial impact if the project is delayed by 3 or 6 months?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate additional costs and delayed benefits from timeline extension.

text: What is the cost of switching providers if needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate migration costs including development, testing, and data transfer.

text: What insurance or financial hedging protects against AI-related losses?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess insurance options for AI-specific risks.

text: What sunk cost thresholds trigger project reassessment?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human judgment on reassessment trigger points.

text: What exit costs apply if the project is cancelled?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate exit costs including contracts, decommissioning, and data migration.

text: What AI/ML engineering salary/rate budget is needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Research market rates for required AI/ML roles.

text: What data engineering resource costs are expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate data engineering effort and costs.

text: What DevOps/MLOps resource costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate MLOps support effort and costs.

text: What product management resource costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate PM allocation and costs.

text: What UX research and design resource costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate design effort for AI interface development.

text: What QA and testing resource costs are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate testing effort from scope and quality requirements.

text: What domain expert or SME time costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate SME engagement hours for training data and validation.

text: What recruiting or contractor sourcing costs are expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate hiring costs from required positions and market conditions.

text: What legal review costs apply to AI contracts and agreements?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate legal review hours from contract complexity.

text: What compliance audit costs are expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Price compliance audits based on regulatory requirements.

text: What regulatory filing or certification costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Look up filing fees and certification costs for applicable regulations.

text: What data protection officer (DPO) or privacy counsel costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate DPO time allocation for AI data processing oversight.

text: What ethical review board or advisory costs are expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate ethics review costs from review frequency and complexity.

text: What intellectual property protection costs apply (patents, trade secrets)?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate IP protection costs from scope of innovations.

text: What end-user training development and delivery costs are expected?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate training costs from user population and complexity.

text: What change management program costs apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate change management from scope and organizational impact.

text: What documentation and knowledge base creation costs are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate documentation effort from system complexity.

text: What ongoing training update and maintenance costs are projected?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate annual training refresh costs.

text: What helpdesk or support ramp-up costs are expected during rollout?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate support costs during adoption period.

text: What carbon offset costs are associated with AI compute?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate carbon footprint and offset costs from compute usage.

text: What green energy premium costs apply to data center usage?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess green energy options and cost differentials for cloud providers.

text: What sustainability reporting and compliance costs exist?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate effort for ESG reporting related to AI operations.

text: What are the estimated monthly recurring, one-time, and total annual costs?
aiAgentGuidance: Sum all monthly cost components (API + infrastructure + operations).

text: What is the total estimated one-time build cost?
aiAgentGuidance: Sum all one-time development and setup costs.

text: What is the estimated annual total cost?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate annual cost from monthly recurring + amortized one-time costs.

text: What is the cost per unit of value delivered?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate cost-per-outcome from total cost and value metrics.

text: What is the estimated break-even point?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate break-even from cumulative costs vs. cumulative benefits.

text: What is the estimated 3-year ROI?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate 3-year ROI from total costs and total benefits.

text: What is the cost comparison vs. the current (non-AI) solution?
aiAgentGuidance: Compare AI solution costs against current process costs.

text: What financial approval recommendations does the analysis support?
aiAgentGuidance: Summarize financial analysis with go/no-go recommendation.

text: How do projected costs compare to industry benchmarks?
aiAgentGuidance: Research industry cost benchmarks for similar AI implementations.

text: What are peer organizations spending on similar AI initiatives?
aiAgentGuidance: Research peer spending through industry reports and surveys.

text: What cost-per-user or cost-per-transaction benchmarks are available?
aiAgentGuidance: Look up per-unit cost benchmarks for the AI use case type.

text: How does the AI investment compare to typical IT project costs?
aiAgentGuidance: Compare with organization's typical IT project investment levels.

text: What analyst reports provide cost guidance for this type of AI implementation?
aiAgentGuidance: Research analyst reports (Gartner, Forrester) for AI cost benchmarks.

text: What cost monitoring dashboard, tagging strategy, and anomaly detection are in place?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend FinOps dashboard based on cloud provider and requirements.

text: What cost allocation tags and labels will be applied?
aiAgentGuidance: Design tagging taxonomy for cost tracking and attribution.

text: What cost anomaly detection and alerting will be configured?
aiAgentGuidance: Configure anomaly detection thresholds and alert routing.

text: What regular cost review cadence and stakeholder audience applies?
aiAgentGuidance: Set reporting cadence and audience from financial governance requirements.

text: What cost optimization review process ensures ongoing efficiency?
aiAgentGuidance: Design periodic optimization review with action tracking.
